reference_name: Arenskoetter 2022 polarization-preserving QFC 854 nm -> 1550 nm (Sagnac PPLN DFG)
throughput_semantics: external device efficiency including all optical-component and spectral-filtering losses, operated at the polarization-matched point 57.2% (H-arm pump reduced to match the V-arm maximum; H max 60.1%, V max 57.2%)
conversion_noise_semantics: total detected conversion-induced in-band background counts per second per converted optical channel after the full filter stack, dominated by anti-Stokes Raman scattering of the 1904 nm pump; the histogram kernel maps two converted BSM input channels onto four analyzer detector modes as rate/2 per detector
polarization_process_fidelity_semantics: process fidelity of polarization preservation measured with attenuated laser light (99.947(2)%); not consumed by the kernel's throughput-only conversion model
coincidence_window_conventions: companion-source conventions: detection window 1.5*tau_mean captures 78% of the exponential photon wavepacket, 5*tau_mean captures 91%; source photon wavepacket tau_H=15.78 ns, tau_V=12.94 ns (SPDC cavity photons, not ion emission)
limitations: this is the Saarbruecken 854 nm D5/2-P3/2 interface companion device, not the Cui 866 nm P1/2-D3/2 node converter; all values in this file are internally same-device consistent. Throughput-only conversion model plus a detected background rate; bandwidth/temporal-mode/polarization-process effects are recorded as metadata only.
